name: Mongolian Death Worm Capture Department Activity Record
short_description: I arrived in the land of Mongolia to capture the Mongolian Death Worm. To capture my beloved Mongolian Death Worm and save our Mongolian Death Worm Capture Department from extinction. ◆Game Introduction This is a visual novel style visual novel game. The estimated playing time is about 1 hour.
detailed_description:
Mongolian Death Worm. It is the ultimate UMA, with a perfect balance of form, ecology, and name. I arrived in the land of Mongolia to capture the Mongolian Death Worm. However, Mongolia has turned into a magical city with an army and an infestation of UMAs! To capture my beloved Mongolian Death Worm and save our Mongolian Death Worm Capture Department from extinction.

Now, the battle for the survival of the planet begins. ━━━━━━

◆Game Introduction◆

・This is a text adventure in the form of a visual novel game.

・There is no branching by choices, and there is one ending.

・The estimated playing time is about 1 hour.
